name: Bulgur Wheat & Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine mushrooms, zucchini, water, bulgur wheat, onion, green pepper, garlic, chicken bouillon granules, basil, celery seed, thyme or marjoram, and pepper.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat and stir in chopped tomato. Cover and simmer until all the liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes.
4. Fluff with a fork. Serve as 4 (3/4-cup) servings.
5. Food Exchange: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
